zh.West Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England,: 英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾韋斯特 維可姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey Dormer IV於1417年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾韋斯特 維可姆時，他的父親Geoffrey Dormer III32歲，母親Judith Isabel Badlington30歲。他於大約1437年與Alice Ursulla Collingridge在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾韋斯特 維可姆結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1503年3月9日在英國奧可福爾坦享年86歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭奧可福爾坦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffrey Dormer IV于1417年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾韋斯特 維可姆时，他的父亲Geoffrey Dormer III32岁，母亲Judith Isabel Badlington30岁。他于大约1437年与Alice Ursulla Collingridge在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾韋斯特 維可姆结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1503年3月9日在英国奧可福爾坦享年86岁，埋葬在英国英格兰奧可福爾坦。

nameMeanings.name: Dormer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname for a lazy man or a sleepyhead from Old French dormeur ‘sleeper, sluggard’ (from Latin dormitor, from dormire ‘to sleep’).

Irish (Kilkenny): when not of the same origin as 1 above, this is a shortened Anglicized form of the Donegal name Ó Díorma, a shortened form of Ó Duibhdhíormaigh ‘descendant of Duibhdhíormach’, a personal name composed of Gaelic dubh ‘black’ + díormach ‘trooper’.
German (Dörmer): occupational name for a watchman on a tower (of a castle or town), from an agent derivative of Middle Low German torn or Middle High German turn ‘tower’. Compare Dermer and Dorner .

variants.name: Dermer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hersh, Pinchas, Yaffa.
German: from an old personal name, Terrimar, a variant of Därr (see Darr ).
German: variant of Dörmer (see Dormer ), an occupational name for a watchman, someone who manned a tower. Compare Derner .

variants.name: Dearmond
meanings: Irish: variant of Dermond, a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Duibhdhiorma ‘descendant of Duibhdhiorma’ a personal name meaning ‘black trooper’ (see Dormer 2). There has been some confusion between the personal names Duibhdhiorma and Diarmaid, so that Dearmond alternates with McDermott . See also Dearman 2.

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey Dormer IV was born in 1417, in West Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Geoffrey Dormer III, was 32 and his mother, Judith Isabel Badlington, was 30. He married Alice Ursulla Collingridge about 1437, in West Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 9 March 1503, in Thame, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 86, and was buried in Thame, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey Dormer IV est né en 1417, à West Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Geoffrey Dormer III, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Judith Isabel Badlington, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Alice Ursulla Collingridge environ 1437, à West Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 9 mars 1503, à Thame, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterré à Thame, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat um 1437 in West Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Alice Ursulla Collingridge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 9. März 1503 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Thame, Oxfordshire, England und wurde in Thame, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Dormer IVが1417年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウエスト ウイコンベで生まれた時，父Geoffrey Dormer IIIは32歳，母Judith Isabel Badlingtonは30歳であった。約1437年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウエスト ウイコンベでAlice Ursulla Collingridgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1503年3月9日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアサムで86歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアサムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Dormer IV(이)가 1417년 영국 벅잉함실르 웨스트 윈이코브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey Dormer III(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Judith Isabel Badlington(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1437년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 웨스트 윈이코브에서 Alice Ursulla Collingridge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1503년 3월 9일 영국 스퍼드실르 섬에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 섬에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey Dormer IV nasceu em 1417, em West Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Geoffrey Dormer III, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Judith Isabel Badlington, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Ursulla Collingridge aproximadamente 1437, em West Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de março de 1503, em Thame, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 86 anos, e foi sepultado em Thame, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey Dormer IV родился в 1417 г. в местности вест викомб, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Geoffrey Dormer III было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Judith Isabel Badlington, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Ursulla Collingridge около 1437 г. в местности вест викомб, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 9 марта 1503 г. в местности там, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 86 лет и был похоронен в местности там, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Alice Ursulla Collingridge aproximadamente 1437, en West Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 9 de marzo de 1503, en Thame, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultado en Thame, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
